label: Flow A — Ingest & Store
info:
Receives sensor messages from MQTT and writes them to InfluxDB.
All bike topics write to measurement 'bike' (models/bike.ts).
Station topics write to measurement 'station'.

label: Flow B — Fall Detection
info:
Monitors IMU data for sudden acceleration spikes that indicate a fall.
Writes to measurement 'alert' (models/alert.ts).

label: Flow C — Parking Violation
info:
Detects stationary bikes parked outside authorized zones.
Writes to measurement 'alert' (models/alert.ts).

label: Flow D — Battery & Dock Events
info:
Monitors battery levels and dock/undock events.
Writes to measurement 'alert' (models/alert.ts).

name: GPS → bike measurement
IMU → bike measurement
Status → bike measurement
Station → station measurement
Detect Fall (|z| > 25)
Detect Unauthorized Parking
Check Low Battery (< 15%)
